title: The new procedure of a designed scientific experiment arrangement
author: kaminsky nikolay (nohim)
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Scientific and technical specialists involved in the development of new technological processes and chemical products face the problem of optimizing the conduct of experiments, trials, and field tests. This makes the task of planning an experiment one of the key ones, and the development of new approaches in this direction is of great relevance. The existing methods of design have certain disadvantages that distort the experimental results. This work aims to the development of a new methodology for the designed experiment arrangement. A new procedure for organizing the designed scientific experiment was obtained. The results of the two-factor experiment were formulated.
